name: codex-workflows
description: Codex workflow harness and skills library.

interface.shortDescription: Codex workflow harness and skill library
interface.longDescription: A Codex-focused workflow harness for design, planning, execution, debugging, review, verification, and branch closeout.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Workflows when a design, plan, execution, debugging, review, verification, or branch-finish workflow applies. The package follows a Natural-Language Agent Harness model: read docs/language-contracts/ for human-facing workflow authority, and treat tools/scripts/tests as evidence or explicit code authority only when classified.
